scripts.dev: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then exec node --watch --env-file ../../.env --import tsx src/index.ts; else exec node --watch --import tsx src/index.ts; fi
scripts.start: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then exec node --env-file ../../.env --import tsx src/index.ts; else exec node --import tsx src/index.ts; fi
